Enum Class InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType>
neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment.InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
InletDeviceModel
public static enum InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType extends Enum<InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType>
Types of separator inlet devices.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim team

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    DEFLECTOR_PLATE
    Flat deflector plate (baffle).
    HALF_PIPE
    Half-pipe (diverter) open at the bottom.
    IMPINGEMENT_PLATE
    Impingement plate.
    INLET_CYCLONE
    Inlet cyclone (tangential or axial entry).
    INLET_VANE
    Inlet vane distributor.
    NONE
    No inlet device — direct pipe entry.
    SCHOEPENTOETER
    Schoepentoeter (proprietary-style momentum absorber).

  • Enum Constant Details

    • NONE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType NONE
      No inlet device — direct pipe entry.

    • DEFLECTOR_PLATE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType DEFLECTOR_PLATE
      Flat deflector plate (baffle).

    • HALF_PIPE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType HALF_PIPE
      Half-pipe (diverter) open at the bottom.

    • INLET_VANE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType INLET_VANE
      Inlet vane distributor.

    • INLET_CYCLONE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType INLET_CYCLONE
      Inlet cyclone (tangential or axial entry).

    • SCHOEPENTOETER

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType SCHOEPENTOETER
      Schoepentoeter (proprietary-style momentum absorber).

    • IMPINGEMENT_PLATE

      public static final InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType IMPINGEMENT_PLATE
      Impingement plate.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Gets the human-readable display name.
      Returns:
      display name

    • getTypicalBulkEfficiency

      public double getTypicalBulkEfficiency()
      Gets the typical bulk liquid removal efficiency.
      Returns:
      bulk efficiency [0-1]

    • getDsdMultiplier

      public double getDsdMultiplier()
      Gets the DSD size multiplier (downstream d_50 = multiplier * upstream d_50). Values less than 1 indicate coalescence (beneficial), greater than 1 indicates re-atomization (detrimental).
      Returns:
      DSD multiplier

    • getPressureDropCoefficient

      public double getPressureDropCoefficient()
      Gets the pressure drop velocity head coefficient. Delta_P = K * 0.5 * rho_mix * v_nozzle^2.
      Returns:
      pressure drop coefficient
